codeReview.summary: The feature implements core cast-tail hardening and adds broad tests, but it does not fully satisfy invalid-file handling due to a blocking whitespace-only file case.

issues.description: Whitespace-only invalid files are treated as live streams instead of format errors. `processLine` skips blank lines (line 75), `hasContent` is set once bytes are read (line 115), and EOF then enters live mode (line 132) without ever requiring a valid header. Repro observed: tailing a file containing only `\n` prints `[live - waiting for output...]` and hangs past 7s instead of exiting with invalid-format error, violating the feature's invalid-file expectation.

Header validation errors are thrown from `validateHeader` and not caught at call-site, so invalid headers (e.g. version 1) produce a Bun stack trace rather than a clean CLI format-error message. Exit code is still non-zero, but UX is inconsistent with other handled errors.

sharedStateObservations.observation: `impl-worker` typecheck guidance does not match project reality, causing avoidable command churn.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Skill `.factory/skills/impl-worker/SKILL.md` step 7 says `bun tsc --noEmit`, while mission `AGENTS.md` and `.factory/services.yaml` specify `bunx tsc --noEmit`. Transcript skeleton shows worker tried `bun tsc` (failed), then `npx tsc` (failed), then `bunx tsc` (passed).

sharedStateObservations.observation: Skill requires tests-first TDD, but execution order in the transcript was implementation-first while still marked as followed procedure.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Skill step 3 says "Write tests first (TDD)". Transcript skeleton for session `20321b45-2c32-4e86-b869-3bff7b6cab84` shows `Create src/cast-tail.ts` before `Create src/cast-tail.test.ts`, yet handoff reports `skillFeedback.followedProcedure: true`.

summary: Fail: substantial progress and good test breadth, but a blocking invalid-file gap remains (whitespace-only files never error and hang in live-tail mode).
